KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ArtifactCase_Description: A strange metal container of unknown origin. It's slightly warm to the touch.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SuppliesForPoor_Description: A box full of various items intended to bring relief to the locals.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_WeaponSupplyTracker_Descriptio: A device that uses satellite signals to determine and record the precise location of an object or person. Commonly used for vehicle tracking or personal safety.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BodyTracker_Description: A device that uses satellite signals to determine and record the precise location of an object or person. Commonly used for vehicle tracking or personal safety.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ArtisanBriefcase_Description: A briefcase presumably full of money. Great for making new friends.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_CameraKanoa_Description: The last viewed photo on this camera is of Kanoa and his family.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_WeirdBook_Description: A book filled with strange drawings and cryptic symbols. Looks that it's bound in human flesh and inked in blood, but it's probably just faux leather and red ink.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_AntiqueRevolver_Description: This case contains an exquisite work of art in the form of a deadly weapon.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_GoodbyeLetter_Description: This letter contains a heartfelt goodbye and an explanation of the man's actions - he offered himself as a human target in order to provide for his family.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_IntelFolder_Description: A folder containing info about some sort of arms deal between the local criminal elements and the LAF.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SecurityFootage_Description: This footage identifies the current inhabitants of YBL-1 as the Lamang Liberation Army.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_PrisonerFolder_Description: This folder contains information about prisoner 23. He was processed here and transported to an unknown location.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_CameraWiretap_Description: A device that can be used to tap into any survaillance stream.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Codebook_Description: This book contains decryption keys used by the LAF.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_WrittenOrders_Description: Contains orders to not let the majority of civilians evacuate. The reasoning for that is unknown.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_CommanderDetails_Description: Details about the new commander of Fort Narith. It looks like he was appointed just a few weeks prior to the Event, and is not from Lamang.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_TurncoatFolder_Description: A personal folder numbered 00616 on Nuon Bintang. Apparently, he was Fort Narith's former commander and was dishonorably discharged for a multitude of very shady deals.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_TurncoatValuables_Description: A briefcase full of non-specific valuables that allegedly belong to Turncoat.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_PatrolSchedule_Description: Contains all the patrol routes and assigned soldiers.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ArrestOrders_Description: An arrest warrant for Artisan's former colleague.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNSupplies_Description: This box contains various medical supplies used to support both the UNLRA and the local populace.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlashDrive_Description: This drive contains important information regarding the planned patrol routes of enemy forces.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_DetonatorCase_Description: A case containing prepared detonators to be used with the fertilizer bombs.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_StraussFolder_Description: Contains orders to interrogate an unknown PMC-affiliated prisoner. At the end, the folder contains information that the prisoner has escaped, and an order for recapture was suprisingly not given.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_StraussTranscript_Description: Details the little bits of information that were extracted from the stubborn prisoner. Apparently, he belongs to a PMC operating from within Ground Zero.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ShootingGuestsList_Description: This list contains names of guests and what services they purchased.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_GolfClubs_Description: An extremely valuable golf club. It is truly priceless.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_MedicDiary_Description: A diary of a local doctor who got left behind during the evacuation. A couple of the last entries mention a "female PMC medical officer" who was helping him by stashing supplies outside of the PMC base camp.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Medalion_Description: A gold-plated medallion which was given to Kanoa by his wife.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_CriminalNotes_Description: A notepad belonging to one of the criminals who got left behind on the island.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SuspitiousPhone_Description: A smartphone belonging to one of the criminals who got left behind on the island.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BunkerFloppyDisks_Description: Floppy disks that carry valuable information.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_AirportFlashDrive_Description: The flash drive contains orders for a foreign gang sent to Lamang to secure some kind of compromising materials.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_RangeNotes_Description: Contains a "menu" of all the possible targets that can be shot at for the VIP's pleasure. The target can be then cooked and served for an extra fee.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_LagoonIntel_Description: Contains information about the past and current activites of the hostile group residing in the Blue Lagoon.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BlueLagoonNotes_Description: This note contains names of kidnapped people who were being transported to various places. Namely the Midnight Sapphire and Tiger Bay "processing."
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_GirlDiary_Description: Contains details on the tourist's plans and confirms her identity. She met some guys who like to party and got invited to their "special place." No more entries after that...
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BoxFullOfPassports_Descripiton: The box contains passports and other personal documents collected by the gang over the course of their operation.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_MilitaryJetsDeal_Description: This folder contains details of the exchange, the budget and the goods being traded. Somebody gained a lot of money from this deal, and the LAF got barely functional training jets.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_CallToArms_Description: Call up papers for Atsawin Xiong. He is to report to Fort Narith ASAP.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BiologicalSampleTakingKit_Desc: This kit is used to safely collect various samples.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_DirtyIntel1_Description: This VHS carries the title "A second to Midnight". You should probably not think too much of the implications.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_DirtyIntel2_Description: Contains a lot of questionable materials and is not password protected.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_DirtyIntel3_Description: Whatever is recorded on this flash drive is certainly illegal in most of the civilized world.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ClientPhone_Description: Still contains a written but unsent message.
KeysToEntries.Questitem_FalseIntel_Description: Intel containing deceptive information to confuse the enemy and greatly benefit the PMC.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_CigarsResort_Description: Very valuable cigars. Maybe no one will notice if you take one for a job well done?
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ResortGold_Description: You will probably not see that amount of riches in one place for a while. Unless its fake, of course.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlightPlans_Description: This document contains all the routes taken by pilots in the months leading up to the Event.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SuspitiousBox_Description: Is it full of drugs? It's probably full of drugs, isn't it? Of course it's full of drugs...
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_StraussDiary_Description: Contains information about activities of the mercenary posing as a tourist. The last log is dated November 24 - the day of the Event.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ArtisanPlea_Description: The drive contains a recording of Artisan's appeal to stop hostilities with the PMC.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ElisaTestingKit_Description: Specialized tools for analyzing bodily fluids.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ArtisanTools_Description: An older set of tools that seems incredibly well-maintained. The inside of the box also reveals an old note that states, "For Laya, my love. One day you will fix this world."
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNLRAMedical_Description: Contains information about the medical state of all the people entering the UNLRA refugee camp.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_PlantedPassport_Description: A client's passport that needs to be delivered to Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_InterrogationTranscript_Descri: A transcript of the local mechanic's interrogation. He admitted to secretly sabotaging LAF vehicles at Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SoldierDiary_Description: The diary details the first days of the soldier's life at Fort Narith. The last entry mentions Ground Zero.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_TurncoatPackage_Description: A box with unknown contents to be placed inside of a plane.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SawmillMedic_Description: Details the number of wounded and their condition after the failed attack on Fort Narith.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNLRA1_Description: This file details the day-to-day activities of UNLRA staff.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNLRA2_Description: Orders given to LAF about their cooperation with the UNLRA.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNLRA3_Description: The date of the Event is mentioned in the folder's contents. It does not match with the filing time of this folder.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNLRA4_Description: This folder contains a detailed account of the UNLRA operation, its mission and evaluation of success.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ListofNames1_Description: This document contains information about certain people who are not permitted to leave the island under any circumstances.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ListofNames2_Description: These orders specify how to approach the UNLRA activities regarding the transfers of individuals from the Tiger Bay refugee camp back into the hands of the LAF.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BlackBox_Description: A black box with valuable data from the flight above Ground Zero.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlightDataHDD_Description: A hard drive full of flight manifests from the past two years.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_IntelPhone_Description: A smartphone containing intel about the Midnight Sapphire Resort.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BunkerAttackPlans_Description: Plans describing an attack of the Lamang Liberation Army on YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ExpansionPlans_Description: LLA plans that describe further expansion of their influence after sucessfully capturing YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_VialForSamples_Avian_Descripti: Avian tissue samples from Ban Pa.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SDCard_Description: An SD card with damning evidence of savage crimes.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Laptop_Description: A laptop which contains crucial information.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_UNLRAEmployeeCard_Description: A UNLRA terminal access card belonging to R. Taylor.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_LAFHardwareKey_Description: An LAF hardware key for accessing top-secret files.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_NoteWithNumbers_Description: A blue note with the numbers 0451 written on it. Possibly a code for something.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_LamangSoldiersDogtags_Descript: A dog tag belonging to one of the officers from Fort Narith. It records their name, blood type, and personal number.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_GoatFolder_Description: A folder full of compromising materials, including heinous acts involving both people and animals.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SurvivalMultitool_Description: A professional multitool designed to assist in accessing various pieces of radio equipment and more.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_IndustrialWaterFilter_Descript: Industrial air filter from YBL-1. Dirty.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_AtrocitiesVHS_Description: A VHS from YBL-1 full of inhumane scenes of torture and death.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_InfirmarySamples_Description: A vial containing biological samples from a deceased LAF soldier who visited Ground Zero. They appear to pulse slightly when exposed to bright light.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlashDrive_Banshee_Quest_24_De: A USB drive full of evidence regarding the illicit activities happening in Midnight Sapphire.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SuspiciousPhone_Turncoat_Quest: A phone full of intel about one of the clients of Midnight Sapphire. An excellent tool for some honest-to-God blackmail.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Laptop_Handshake_Quest_36_Desc: A laptop belonging to Narith Sayavong's right-hand man, Jan Park. Probably filled to the brim with high-value intel.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_BiologicalSamples_LabRat_Quest: Biological samples from an UNLRA laboratory in Tiger Bay. Some parts show miniscule signs of movement.
Biological samples from a deceased UNLRA peacekeeper. They appear completely charred, but at the same time won't stop bleeding.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Laptop_LabRat_Quest_26_Descrip: A laptop belonging to Neil Osprey.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlashDrive_Handshake_Quest_47_: A USB drive full of high-value data from the UNLRA HQ at Tiger Bay.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Laptop_Handshake_Quest_59_Desc: An LAF laptop found at the entrance to Ground Zero.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_EncryptedLetter_LabRat_Quest_2: An encrypted letter with unknown contents.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_SusBox_Handshake_Quest_75_Desc: A sealed box with unknown contents.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FoodSupplies_LabRat_Quest_3_De: A box of assorted food supplies for local relief.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Handshake_Quest_76A_Descriptio: <DEV> Notes kept by criminals around the LRI base camp.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Handshake_Quest_76B_Descriptio: <DEV> Notes kept by criminals around the MSS base camp.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Handshake_Quest_76C_Descriptio: <DEV> Notes kept by criminals around the CSI base camp.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_TransmissionDataHDD_Descriptio: A backend storage device with transmission data from the Siang Radio Station.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_IrradiatedBiologicalSamples_De: Biological samples from the corpses in Phousai Village. The sooner you hand these over, the better.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_ScamOfficeBackupHDD_Descriptio: A backup drive from the Lamtel offices.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_OldJapaneseMedallion_Descripti: An old Japanese medallion containing a photograph of a young woman. The inscription reads: “I will always love you. Hanako.”
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_VialForSamples_HuntersParadise: Biological samples from a restaurant in Hunter's Paradise. Judging by the smell, you'd be wise to keep your distance.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_PoisonedCiviliansBiologicalSam: Biological samples from Na Xieng Farm. Nothing about them seems out of the ordinary.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlashDrive_Stock_Gunny_02_Desc: A hardware authentication key required to unlock a secured laptop.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Laptop_Stock_Gunny_02_Descript: A secured laptop containing valuable operational data.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Key_Stock_Banshee_01_Descripti: A key to John Carmillion's locker.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlashDrive_Stock_Turncoat_02_D: A flash drive containing valuable data from Ground Zero.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_HDD_Stock_Turncoat_02_Descript: An LAF hard drive containing contextual information and encryption keys.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Key_Stock_Vulture_02_Descripti: A key to a drop-off box belonging to one of Vulture's collectors.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Vulture_03_Desc: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the AK-308, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Artisan_03_Desc: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the AKMN, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Gunny_03_Descri: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the DDM4, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Handshake_29_Desc: A briefcase containing intel about the LAF.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Banshee_Quest_0: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the SIG MCX, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the MP7A2, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Gunny_04_Descri: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the Mossberg 590, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Artisan_Quest_0: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the SVD Dragunov, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Magazine_Stock_Banshee_Quest_0: An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the M700, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
An issue of Range & Rifle dedicated to the M14, featuring current weaponsmithing trends and customization insights.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FlashDrive_Quest_CT_Handshake_: A secured USB drive full of valuable data.
A secured USB drive full of valuable data.
A secured USB drive full of valuable data.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_MedicalSupplies_Quest_CT_Labra: A box full of essential medical supplies.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_FoodSupplies_Quest_CT_Labrat_0: A box full of various non-perishable food supplies.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_06_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_07_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_08_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_09_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_10_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_11_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_12_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_13_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
KeysToEntries.QuestItem_Briefcase_CT_Turncoat_14_Descr: A secured briefcase containing items of significant value.
